subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: You must have deep love for one another. Go to see each other and be consoling friends to all.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شما ها بیکدیگر خیلی محبت داشته باشید دیدن همدیگر نمائید غمخوار کل باشید
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @words vs deeds, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
